---
title: "Work Experience"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
source("./site_libs/site.R")
file <- "work"
```

```{r main}
nav()
print_work()
pander('\n\n\n
## Brigham Young University - Idaho \n\n\n 
#### Part-Time \n\n\n
### Teaching Assistant {.tabset .tabset-fade} \n\n\n')
print_work('ta')
print_newline()
print_tutor()
footer(file)
```
